'''''Formidable''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Along with Strike cruisers [[Triumph (Strike-class)|''Triumph'']], [[Indomitable (Strike-class)|''Indomitable'']] and the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Grey Wolf]]'' it was to ambush a strike force, sent by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]], that was supposed to ambush a convoy of what was supposed to carry [[Missile Boat]]s, when in reality they carried munitions. The strike force was destroyed and the ships went into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
